# LogicThink Project Setup

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Overview
React project using Vite and Tailwind CSS with the following:
- React 19.2.0
- Vite 7.2.4
- Tailwind CSS 3.4.1
- PostCSS and Autoprefixer configured

## Setup Instructions
Run `npm install` to install dependencies and then `npm run dev` to start the development server.
